payload.description: SBS customers pay their fare at machines located at SBS stops before boarding, reducing the time to pick up and drop off passengers.
New medians, pedestrian waiting areas, and crosswalks improve the safety and comfort of pedestrians and bus riders along the corridor.
Bus lanes along Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards bring faster and more reliable service to more than 30,000 daily bus riders.

Bus stops along 1.3 miles of Woodhaven Blvd where service roads now exist will be a better place to wait for the bus with added amenities such as real time passenger information, public art, and seating.
payload.location_text: Woodhaven Blvd between Park Lane South and Rockaway/Liberty Ave

normalized_location.raw_text: Woodhaven Blvd between Park Lane South and Rockaway/Liberty Ave

payload.description: Q52/Q53 SBS buses will have TSP technology, which improves bus and general travel times by holding a green light longer or shortening a red light faster when a bus is approaching.
Portions of Woodhaven and Cross Bay Blvd will be resurfaced to provide a smoother ride for bus riders and private vehicles alike.
